title: IngestClaudeFileEvent
description: Per-file NDJSON line emitted by `ingest --mode claude-code`. Status is `done` (success), `failed` (error), or `preview` (dry-run). Includes `entities` count, `rels` count, and `cost_usd` per file.

file.description: Filesystem path of the ingested file.

memory_id.description: Row ID of the created or updated memory. Present when status is done.

entities.description: Number of entities extracted from the file. Present when status is done or preview.

rels.description: Number of relationships extracted from the file. Present when status is done or preview.

cost_usd.description: LLM cost in USD for processing this file. Present when status is done or preview.

elapsed_ms.description: Wall-clock time in milliseconds for this file. Present when status is done.

error.description: Error message. Present when status is failed.

index.description: Zero-based index of this file in the batch.

total.description: Total number of files in the batch.
